scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-black uppercase

spacing_and_layout.containers: Thick 2px borders (#0A0A0A), sharp or max 8px rounded corners, solid drop shadows (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A]).
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Used heavily for Student Dashboards (Stats, XP, Upcoming tasks) and Teacher Overviews.
spacing_and_layout.padding: p-6 to p-12 for distinct content blocks.

components.strategy: Shadcn/UI components heavily customized for Neo-Brutalism.
components.buttons: Thick borders (2px), sharp corners, solid offset shadow. On hover: translate down-right, remove shadow.
components.cards: Flat surfaces (white or pastel bg), thick black borders, hard shadow.
components.progress_bars: Blocky fills, high-contrast edges, no soft gradients. Thick black border wrapper.
components.forms: Inputs with 2px borders, focus state rings in primary/accent colors.

interactions.hover: Interactive elements must translate (translate-y-1 translate-x-1) and change shadow to look like physical pressing.
interactions.motion: Use Framer Motion for XP gains, badge unlocks (spring animations, bouncing).

icons.library: lucide-react (default) and @phosphor-icons/react (duotone weight for gamification badges)

hero_landing.description: Happy students learning on a laptop

gamification_badge_gold_star.placement: Student dashboard achievements and level up modals

gamification_reward_chest.placement: Rewards store or milestone completion screen

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or generic fonts for headings. Use 'Cabinet Grotesk'.
Apply Neo-Brutalist styles to Shadcn components: remove soft shadows, add 2px black borders (`border-2 border-black`), and hard drop shadows (`shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#000000]`).
Never use generic full-screen gradients. Use solid pastels or white with thick borders.
Implement gamification effectively: high-contrast progress bars, prominent XP stats, and oversized typography for rankings.
Student dashboard must emphasize "Upcoming Activities" and "Gamification (XP/Badges/Leaderboard)".
Teacher dashboard must emphasize "Quick Course Actions", "Activity Submissions to Grade", and "Course Stats".
